title: Broom Dustpan Set with Comb Teeth Windproof Long Handle Broom Set Dustpan Set Home Office Cleaning Broom (white)
features: 🌷【Lightweight and practical】-- the metal stainless steel pole is lightweight and durable and sweeps the floor without feeling weighty. It can be used as a broom and dustpan combination in the kitchen, home, office or hall.

🌷【Four layers of compact bristles】-- the broom head is made of compact, high-quality bristles that are thick and durable for quick cleaning of debris. The brush head is made of a new material with a highly flexible wire that is resistant to deformation over time and will never damage your wooden floor.

🌷【Excellent detailing】--the angle of the brush head to the floor is a golden 45°, close to the wall, easy to clean dead corners, the scraping teeth on the dustpan are designed so that tangled hairs on the broom are cleaned with a gentle scrape, the mouth of the dustpan fits the floor very well, no dust leaks when sweeping, the broom head can be rotated 180°, you can easily clean under furniture by turning it
🌷【Easy to store】-- the dustpan can be folded. To store, the dustpan is held upright and the broom handle can be fixed to the dustpan handle. It only needs to occupy a small gap for storage
🌷【 Easy to install】--the whole set comes in a sophisticated box. Simple and easy to install. Not easily dislodged after installation, a great helper for your household cleaning
description: Product Description Product Description. The dustpan and broom set features a combed design with a long handle for effective floor cleaning. The soft broom bristles and combed dustpan are easy to use. Key features NO SCRATCHING: The broom bristles are angled, soft and flexible to clean floors. Perfect for cleaning floors without scratching the surface. LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE: The long-handled dustpan and brush set broom is lightweight and portable, effortless to use and makes cleaning easier. Specification Name: Broom and dustpan set Material: PP new plastic, stainless steel pole, PET plastic wire Colour: white Packing list 1 x Broom and dustpan set Attention 1. There may be slight differences between the picture and the actual colour of the product. We will try our best to present the exact colour for you. 2. Please understand that the size may be slightly different due to manual measurement.
